book: The Seventh Ecumenical Council. The Second Council of Nice.

classification.cautionReason: Conciliar or creedal material received in mainstream Nicene Christian tradition, with denominational differences on some canons.

lineage: The Seventh Ecumenical Council. The Second Council of Nice.
Extracts from the Acts. Session III.
title: Extracts from the Acts. Session III.

verses.book: The Seventh Ecumenical Council. The Second Council of Nice.
The Seventh Ecumenical Council. The Second Council of Nice.
The Seventh Ecumenical Council. The Second Council of Nice.
verses.text: Constantine, the most holy bishop of Constantia in Cyprus, said: Since I, unworthy that I am, find that the letter which has just been read, which was sent from the East to Tarasius the most holy archbishop and ecumenical patriarch, is in no sense changed from that confession of faith which he himself had before made, to these I consent and become of one mind, receiving and saluting with honour the holy and venerable images.

verses.book: The Seventh Ecumenical Council. The Second Council of Nice.
verses.text: But the worship of adoration I reserve alone to the supersubstantial and life-giving Trinity.

verses.book: The Seventh Ecumenical Council. The Second Council of Nice.
verses.text: And those who are not so minded, and do not so teach I cast out of the holy Catholic and Apostolic Church, and I smite them with anathema, and I deliver them over to the lot of those who deny the incarnation and the bodily economy of Christ our true God.

verses.book: The Seventh Ecumenical Council. The Second Council of Nice.

verses.book: The Seventh Ecumenical Council. The Second Council of Nice.
verses.text: 17), understood this to mean that a demand had been made at Nicæa that the same devotion should be offered to the images as to the Most Holy Trinity.

verses.book: The Seventh Ecumenical Council. The Second Council of Nice.
verses.text: Under these circumstances it is clear that the Franks could do nothing but reject the decrees.

verses.book: The Seventh Ecumenical Council. The Second Council of Nice.
verses.text: I have treated of this whole matter elsewhere.
